title: Supply Chain Manager - Dedicated Freight Corridor - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Dedicated Freight Corridor - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dedicated Freight Corridor family as a Supply Chain Manager in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!
